subject: Humanoid figure with long dark hair, arms outstretched with two small dragons perched on each hand breathing fire outward, standing amid flames and smoke on a rocky surface
description: A humanoid figure with long dark hair blowing back stands on a broken rocky ledge with arms fully extended to the sides. On each outstretched hand perches a small dragon or wyvern figure, each of which breathes a jet of bright flame outward. The figure's torso is bare or lightly wrapped in cloth. Billowing fire and smoke fill the lower foreground and background, with ruined or mountainous rock formations visible in the far background under a pale overcast sky. The lighting is dominated by warm orange-red fire glow against a cooler grey sky.
foreground: Humanoid figure with arms extended, two small fire-breathing dragons perched on hands, standing on rocky ledge amid flames
background: Rocky ruins, billowing fire and smoke, pale grey overcast sky
emotion: triumphant release, cathartic fury, arms-wide defiance
